output.dependency: These columns together describe a single hospital entity: the hospital name, street address, city, state abbreviation, ZIP code, county, phone number, facility type, and ownership/status all align consistently for the same institution.

These columns appear to be clinically related and syntactically linked: a general condition category is paired with a measure code, a detailed measure description, and a state-prefixed combined code formed from the state abbreviation plus the measure code.
The short measure code determines the detailed quality-measure description; each code corresponds to a specific heart-attack performance measure.
